blocks.text: MASSIVE day: **Benfica↔Real Madrid cross-inference (0.82/0.80, Day-1) = +91.4 & +90.7!** Plus Lutnick (0.34)=+47.4, Vonn (0.25)=+36.5. **TW: 1222.35** (+266!). The cross-question inference strategy was the single best play. Let me record and continue.

input.command:
cd /lustre/fast/fast/sgoel/forecasting/current_sim/final_runs_v37/claude_code_aljazeeraQ12026v37_opus48_r00/26-06-05-11-17-13/agents/minimalHarness_claude-opus-4-8_001/workspace/ && cat >> memory/MEMORY.md << 'EOF'

## JAN20-29: TW 956→1222 (+266!). 
- BENFICA↔REAL MADRID cross-inference (Day1, 0.82/0.80) = +91 & +91! Best play of the game. Cross-question inference = GOLD.
- Board of Peace Pakistan(0.68 Day1)+89; Lutnick(0.34)+47; Vonn(0.25)+37; ICE Milan(0.30)+45; Ukraine talks Abu Dhabi x2 +63; Sudan S.Kordofan(0.22)+30; Burkina Faso(0.25)+29; NFC QB Darnold(0.23)+31.
- LOSSES: Money League=Liverpool not ManCity(0.68, didn't check who won 2024-25 PL)-37; UN mtg=Netherlands(Russia 0.45)-31; oldest paintings=Muna(Sulawesi 0.45)-23; Fury=Makhmudov(AJ 0.42)-21; WC boycott=KNVB(Norway0.45)-22.
- KEY: EARLY predictions get full TW weight (avg over ALL active days). Late/deferred predictions heavily DILUTED (Sabalenka R3 wrong only -2.8). So Day-1 structural calls >> late draws.
- SUPER BOWL LX = Seattle vs New England (updated Q139 to 0.52/0.48).
- Confirmed: my 0.45+ educated guesses ~0/7 LOST; structural 0.55+ mostly won. RULE holds.
## Remaining: mostly Feb-Mar resolutions of already-placed bets + true blinds. Keep advancing, react, refine Super Bowl/tournaments.
EOF
echo saved
